items.q: What is the Esports World Cup 2026?
items.a: A global tournament bringing together the world's top players and clubs across a range of competitive games. This edition takes place in Paris, France, from July 6 to August 23, 2026.

items.q: Does Thamanya broadcast all of its tournaments?
items.a: No. Thamanya carries a selected lineup of Esports World Cup tournaments, and coverage varies by game. You can find the covered tournaments and their dates in [the tournament schedule](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rv7mR5igsqbZ9wyjOjByJIbdb-zyjq6HIcQ3W8rE49E/edit?gid=883712240#gid=883712240).

items.q: Where can I watch the tournaments Thamanya covers?
items.a: On the Thamanya app, with a dedicated space for the tournament inside the app for easy access to the stream, content, and interviews.

items.q: Do I need a subscription to watch?
items.a: No — watching the tournament is available to everyone.

items.q: Can I watch outside the Arab world?
items.a: Broadcast rights are geo-restricted to the Arab world only, so the stream can't be watched outside the region.

items.q: Is it on Thamanya's satellite channels or social media?
items.a: No. The satellite channels are dedicated to Saudi league competitions, and social platforms carry highlights and companion content only.

items.q: What streaming quality should I expect?
items.a: Matches stream in full HD at 1080p. For the best quality, we recommend a stable connection of at least 12 Mbps.

items.q: Can I watch matches after the live broadcast ends?
items.a: Yes — match replays are published after the live stream ends.

items.q: What companion content comes with the tournament?
items.a:
- Gaming Newsletter: short daily content edited from broadcast footage covering the standout moments, plus a recap after each tournament ends.
- Casuals Podcast: special episodes with players and guests from the gaming and esports world, filmed at the tournament venue and released between tournament days.
- Live interviews and content from the event grounds in Paris.
- Daily coverage across social media platforms.
